scripts.setup: mkdir -p ~/.claudeperms && cp hooks/permissions.mjs ~/.claudeperms/permissions.mjs && cp hooks/check-malicious.mjs ~/.claudeperms/check-malicious.mjs && chmod 0755 ~/.claudeperms/check-malicious.mjs && find defaults -maxdepth 1 -type f ! -name claudeperms-package.json -exec cp -n {} ~/.claudeperms/ \; && cp -n defaults/claudeperms-package.json ~/.claudeperms/package.json && (cd ~/.claudeperms && npm install --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund)
